---
title: "GitHub"
subtitle: "Repositories and code samples"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-shell}
<div class="section-heading">Public profile</div>

::: {.content-card}
My GitHub profile is [yuvraj-rathod-1202](https://github.com/yuvraj-rathod-1202).

Use this page for pinned repositories, active experiments, and code that is worth linking from the site.
:::

<div class="section-heading">What belongs here</div>

::: {.content-card}
- Featured repositories
- Short explanations of what each repo does
- Links to demos, papers, or write-ups when they exist
:::
:::
